title: Box Decoration
description: Style a Container with rounded corners and a shadow.
problemStatement:
Style your containers! Create a `Container` with a width and height of `100`. Use `BoxDecoration` to give it a `blue` color and `20` units of `borderRadius`.

**Requirement:** The container should have a child `Text('Box')` centered inside it.
hints: When using `decoration`, the `color` must move inside the `BoxDecoration` object.
expectedOutput: A beautiful blue rounded container with the word 'Box' in the middle.
